mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_heartbeat_config WHERE country_code = #{countryCode} OR country_code IS NULL ORDER BY (country_code IS NULL) ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_heartbeat_config ( country_code, normal_interval, exception_interval, timeout_seconds, max_reconnect_times, reconnect_interval, reconnect_pause, notify_duration, notify_reconnect_times, disable_duration, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{countryCode}, #{normalInterval}, #{exceptionInterval}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{maxReconnectTimes}, #{reconnectInterval}, #{reconnectPause}, #{notifyDuration}, #{notifyReconnectTimes}, #{disableDuration}, NOW(), NOW() )
